related_requirements.requirement: NFR #06 Availability: The web application must guarantee continuous and stable operation, ensuring its availability at any time.
related_requirements.explanation: Microservices allow independent deployment and scaling. An error in one microservice does not mean the complete failure of the application, improving resilience and availability.

related_requirements.requirement: NFR #07 Capacity: The web application must support a large number of simultaneous users without degrading its performance.
related_requirements.explanation: Microservices enable autonomous scaling of specific services based on demand, supporting high capacity without affecting the rest of the system.

related_requirements.requirement: FC #01 Access to portal with authentication
related_requirements.explanation: The architecture divides functionality into services like 'Leader' and 'Access Control' which handle routing and authentication specifically within this pattern.

related_requirements.requirement: NFR #06 Availability: The web application must guarantee continuous and stable operation, ensuring its availability at any time.
related_requirements.explanation: Cloud computing offers high availability and accessibility as resources are managed by providers (AWS) and accessible via Internet anywhere.

related_requirements.requirement: NFR #07 Capacity: The web application must support a large number of simultaneous users without degrading its performance.
related_requirements.explanation: Cloud resources allow scalability according to needs, managing network, database, and servers via Internet to support high loads.

related_requirements.requirement: NFR #08 Access: The system must allow creation, consultation, modification, and deletion of data to authorized users.
related_requirements.explanation: AWS provides robust security services and certifications that facilitate compliance with legal regulations and protection of data infrastructure.

related_requirements.requirement: NFR #05 Speed & Latency: Query operations must have a loading time of less than 1 second.
related_requirements.explanation: Separating responsibilities allows the server to focus on business logic and data integrity while the client focuses on presentation, optimizing communication via HTTP/JSON protocols.

related_requirements.requirement: FC #03 Access to applications from the portal
related_requirements.explanation: The client formulates service requests (selecting an app) and the server processes them and returns responses (redirecting to the main page).

related_requirements.requirement: FC #01 Access to portal with authentication
related_requirements.explanation: Acts as a central management point for traffic, blocking unauthorized connection attempts and applying security protocols before routing.

related_requirements.requirement: NFR #08 Access: The system must allow creation, consultation, modification, and deletion of data to authorized users.
related_requirements.explanation: Incorporates mechanisms to protect integrity and confidentiality of communications, preventing undue accesses.

related_requirements.requirement: NFR #01 Appearance: The new content must maintain visual coherence with the design of the old version of the application.
related_requirements.explanation: Includes binaries necessary for the frontend of the portal and other applications, ensuring visual and functional coherence of the ecosystem.

related_requirements.requirement: FC #02 Visualization of applications according to user
related_requirements.explanation: Provides a centralized interface for accessing different applications, showing the list of applications the user has access to.

related_requirements.requirement: FC #04 Visualization of data according to roles
related_requirements.explanation: Responsible for verifying user identity and determining permissions associated with each user or service according to defined roles.

related_requirements.requirement: FC #05 Access restrictions between clients
related_requirements.explanation: Manages groups and clusters to ensure users only see data associated with their specific client group.

related_requirements.requirement: FC #07 Assign or revoke access to applications
related_requirements.explanation: Manages the creation and maintenance of roles and permissions, allowing administrators to modify user access lists.

related_requirements.requirement: NFR #08 Access: The system must allow creation, consultation, modification, and deletion of data to authorized users.
related_requirements.explanation: Acts as a traceability and audit mechanism, documenting every interaction for analysis and regulatory compliance.

related_requirements.requirement: NFR #02 Ease of use: The system must be easy to use for any user.
related_requirements.explanation: Single-Page Application renders dynamic views and manages internal navigation without reloading pages, improving fluidity of use.

related_requirements.requirement: NFR #04 Learning: The user must be able to perform new operations without special training.
related_requirements.explanation: Dynamic interfaces and familiar navigation patterns reduce learning time for new functionalities.

related_requirements.requirement: NFR #05 Speed & Latency: Query operations must have a loading time of less than 1 second.
related_requirements.explanation: Organizes code in layers separating responsibilities, facilitating efficient management of application operations and query processing.

related_requirements.requirement: NFR #09 Integrity: The application must manage a strict separation of data for each client.
related_requirements.explanation: The backend logic enforces data separation policies through services and repositories connected to specific schemas.

related_requirements.requirement: NFR #09 Integrity: The application must manage a strict separation of data for each client.
related_requirements.explanation: There is a schema for each microservice and each client has its own group of schemas per microservice, ensuring physical/logical data separation.

related_requirements.requirement: NFR #06 Availability: The web application must guarantee continuous and stable operation, ensuring its availability at any time.
related_requirements.explanation: Automates deployment, scaling, and management of containerized applications, ensuring high availability across different servers.

related_requirements.requirement: NFR #02 Ease of use: The system must be easy to use for any user.
related_requirements.explanation: Separates UI logic (View) from business logic (ViewModel), allowing the view to focus on user experience and interactions.

related_requirements.requirement: NFR #04 Learning: The user must be able to perform new operations without special training.
related_requirements.explanation: Clear separation of concerns in the frontend code facilitates maintenance and consistent UI behavior, reducing user confusion.

related_requirements.requirement: NFR #05 Speed & Latency: Query operations must have a loading time of less than 1 second.
related_requirements.explanation: Separates Presentation, Business Logic, Domain, and Data Access layers, avoiding unnecessary coupling and facilitating testing and optimization.

related_requirements.requirement: NFR #08 Access: The system must allow creation, consultation, modification, and deletion of data to authorized users.
related_requirements.explanation: The contract layer separates the internal model from the external API representation, enhancing security and control over exposed data.

related_requirements.requirement: NFR #09 Integrity: The application must manage a strict separation of data for each client.
related_requirements.explanation: Encapsulates database queries and provides default operations (like findByCode), facilitating control of record access and data consistency.

related_requirements.requirement: NFR #08 Access: The system must allow creation, consultation, modification, and deletion of data to authorized users.
related_requirements.explanation: Data Transfer Objects structure information for requests/responses, providing a customized format and hiding internal domain models from the client.

related_requirements.requirement: NFR #03 Personalization & Internationalization: The application must be available in several languages.
related_requirements.explanation: Mappers convert models to DTOs, handling attributes like descriptions which may come from internationalized content tables (LanguageContent).
